fields.name: monogram
fields.label: Hero Monogram
fields.description: Optional 2–4 letters shown faintly inside the hero card (e.g. FCB).

fields.name: heroLabel
fields.label: Hero Label
fields.description: Optional small uppercase label in the hero card (e.g. 'Case Study · 2004 – Present').

fields.name: bg
fields.label: Card Background (hex)
fields.description: fallback when no cover image, e.g. #1a0e08

fields.name: downloadUrl
fields.label: Download URL
fields.description: Optional external link for downloadable resources

description.value: References another document, used as a foreign key
